definitions.usage_example: [TRADUCIR AL IT: This is my favorite book.]

definitions.usage_context_en: Usado como pronombre para un objeto singular cerca del hablante.

definitions.usage_context_es: [TRADUCIR AL IT: Used as a pronoun for a singular item that is far from the speaker.]

definitions.usage_context_en: Usado como pronombre para objetos plurales cerca del hablante.
definitions.usage_context_es: [TRADUCIR AL IT: Used as a pronoun for plural items near the speaker.]
